entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 7 PM CDT TUESDAY

entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 70S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS AROUND 90
CALM WINDS, BECOMING NORTH AROUND 5 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLEAR AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
